ques: Find the wiki page of ohmyzsh on GitHub and tell me how to change the theme of zsh to agnoster.
answer: On the ohmyzsh wiki Themes page (github.com/ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh/wiki/Themes), edit your `~/.zshrc` and set `ZSH_THEME="agnoster"` before Oh My Zsh is sourced, then reload your shell (`source ~/.zshrc`). agnoster also requires a patched Powerline/Nerd font for its symbols to display correctly.
